title: End improvements
description: A mod adding more features to the end, like structures, ores and biomes, while also keeping it simple!
body:
# This mod focuses on improving the end but also keeping it simple with a few new additions:

**Crashed end ships**



Contain enderite upgrade templates

**Enderite** 

Upgrade to netherite, increased durability

All enderite items float above the void if they fall into it

if you die in the void the enderite items will stay floating above the place of your death

Ore spawns in the end highlands biome below the surface

**Void Fire**

Purple fire found in the end dimension, can be made by lighting bedrock on fire


**Chorus wood**

Crafted from the chorus plants, a new purple wood type.

**More end stone variants**

-end stone slabs, stairs, walls

-smooth end stone block and slabs

**Chorus pie**

Like pumpkin pie but _weird_



**Available Languages:**

-English

-Polish

The mod should work with most other end expansion mods

**TEXTURES ARE NOT FINAL!**


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!
